description: List: “Register (thabat) of the names of the elders who...” written upside down on the reverse side of a list of payers of incomplete capitation taxes (see T-S K15.94). The superscription is nearly entirely effaced but the word ‘jarida’ (also register), mostly used on lists of the poor, is clearly visible in the second line. (S. D. Goitein, Mediterranean Society 2:476) EMS
tags: recipients, jaliya, poverty, capitation tax, charity, tax, communal, jizya
description_he: רשימת שמות זקנים שנרשמה הפוך על גב רשימת משלמי מס גולגולת חסר
